subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Truly art thou the revered son of that noble one and the illustrious son-in-law of Samandar, from the essence of spirit and heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء حقا که نجل مبجل آن بزرگواری و صهر جلیل سمندر نار از عنصر جان و دل
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism of color and light, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
